title: 飯店入住
desc: 入住、退房、寄放行李、早餐

phrases.en: Hi, I have a reservation under the name Chen.
phrases.zh: 你好，我有訂房，是登記在 Chen 的名下。
phrases.tip: 把 Chen 換成你的姓；也可說 booked under…

phrases.en: We booked a family room for three nights.
phrases.zh: 我們訂了一間家庭房，住三個晚上。
phrases.tip: double room 雙人房／twin room 兩張單人床

phrases.en: Here's my passport and the booking confirmation.
phrases.zh: 這是我的護照和訂房確認單。
phrases.tip: confirmation email 也可以直接出示手機

phrases.en: Is it possible to check in early? Our flight landed this morning.
phrases.zh: 可以提早入住嗎？我們的班機今天早上就到了。
phrases.tip: check in early = 提早入住

phrases.en: If the room isn't ready, could we leave our bags here for now?
phrases.zh: 如果房間還沒好，我們可以先把行李寄放在這裡嗎？
phrases.tip: leave / store our luggage 都可以

phrases.en: Could we have a room on a high floor, please?
phrases.zh: 可以幫我們安排高樓層的房間嗎？
phrases.tip: 換成 a quiet room / away from the elevator

phrases.en: We'd prefer a quiet room, away from the street if possible.
phrases.zh: 如果可以的話，我們希望要安靜、不靠馬路的房間。
phrases.tip: away from the street = 不靠馬路那側

phrases.en: What time is breakfast, and where is it served?
phrases.zh: 早餐是幾點？在哪裡用餐？
phrases.tip: is breakfast included? 早餐有含嗎

phrases.en: Is breakfast included in the room rate?
phrases.zh: 早餐有含在房價裡嗎？
phrases.tip: room rate = 房價

phrases.en: What time do we need to check out tomorrow?
phrases.zh: 我們明天要幾點退房？
phrases.tip: check-out time 通常是 11 點或中午

phrases.en: Could we get a late check-out? Our flight isn't until the evening.
phrases.zh: 可以晚一點退房嗎？我們的班機是晚上才飛。
phrases.tip: late check-out 常需加價或看空房

phrases.en: We've already checked out. Can we store our luggage until 4 p.m.?
phrases.zh: 我們已經退房了，可以把行李寄放到下午四點嗎？
phrases.tip: 退房後寄放行李很常見，通常免費

phrases.en: Do you need a deposit or a credit card for incidentals?
phrases.zh: 需要押金或信用卡預刷雜費嗎？
phrases.tip: deposit 押金／incidentals 雜費

phrases.en: Could I have two key cards, please?
phrases.zh: 可以給我兩張房卡嗎？
phrases.tip: key card = 房卡（門卡）

lines.en: Good afternoon! Welcome. How can I help you?
lines.zh: 午安，歡迎光臨！有什麼可以為您服務的嗎？

lines.en: Hi, we have a reservation under the name Chen, for a family room.
lines.zh: 你好，我們有訂房，登記在 Chen 的名下，是一間家庭房。

lines.en: Let me check. Yes, three nights with breakfast. May I see your passport?
lines.zh: 我查一下。有的，三晚含早餐。可以看一下您的護照嗎？

lines.en: Sure, here you go. It's a bit early. Is our room ready yet?
lines.zh: 當然，給你。現在有點早，我們的房間好了嗎？

lines.en: I'm afraid it won't be ready until 3 p.m. Would you like to leave your bags with us?
lines.zh: 恐怕要到下午三點才會好。您要先把行李寄放在我們這裡嗎？

lines.en: Yes, please. Also, could we have a quiet room on a high floor?
lines.zh: 好的，麻煩了。另外，可以給我們高樓層、比較安靜的房間嗎？

lines.en: Of course. I've noted a high floor away from the elevator.
lines.zh: 沒問題，我已經幫您註記高樓層、遠離電梯的房間。

lines.en: Great. What time is breakfast served?
lines.zh: 太好了。早餐是幾點供應？

lines.en: From 7 to 10 a.m. in the restaurant on the second floor.
lines.zh: 早上七點到十點，在二樓餐廳。

lines.en: Perfect. And check-out is at eleven?
lines.zh: 太好了。退房是十一點嗎？

lines.en: That's right. Here are your two key cards. Enjoy your stay!
lines.zh: 沒錯。這是您的兩張房卡，祝您住得愉快！

lines.en: Thank you so much!
lines.zh: 非常謝謝你！

title: 客房與服務
desc: 客房要求、故障報修、加床、叫醒服務

phrases.en: Hi, this is room 812. The air conditioning isn't working.
phrases.zh: 你好，這裡是 812 房，冷氣壞了。
phrases.tip: 換 the heater 暖氣／the TV 電視

phrases.en: There's no hot water in the shower. Could someone take a look?
phrases.zh: 浴室沒有熱水，可以請人來看一下嗎？
phrases.tip: take a look = 來看看／檢查

phrases.en: The toilet won't flush. Could you send someone up?
phrases.zh: 馬桶沖不了水，可以請人上來嗎？
phrases.tip: won't flush = 沖不下去

phrases.en: Could we get some extra towels, please?
phrases.zh: 可以再給我們一些毛巾嗎？
phrases.tip: extra pillows 多的枕頭／a blanket 毯子

phrases.en: Could we have two more pillows and a blanket?
phrases.zh: 可以再給我們兩顆枕頭和一條毯子嗎？
phrases.tip: one more = 再一個

phrases.en: What's the Wi-Fi password for the room?
phrases.zh: 房間的 Wi-Fi 密碼是多少？
phrases.tip: network name 網路名稱（SSID）

phrases.en: The Wi-Fi keeps disconnecting. Is there anything you can do?
phrases.zh: Wi-Fi 一直斷線，你們有辦法處理嗎？
phrases.tip: keeps disconnecting = 一直斷

phrases.en: Could we add an extra bed for our child?
phrases.zh: 可以幫我們的小孩加一張床嗎？
phrases.tip: extra bed 加床／crib 嬰兒床

phrases.en: Is there a charge for the extra bed?
phrases.zh: 加床要另外收費嗎？
phrases.tip: Is it free? 免費嗎

phrases.en: Could we have a wake-up call at six thirty tomorrow morning?
phrases.zh: 明天早上六點半可以幫我們設個叫醒服務嗎？
phrases.tip: wake-up call = 電話叫醒

phrases.en: Could you send up some drinking water, please?
phrases.zh: 可以送一些飲用水上來嗎？
phrases.tip: bottled water 瓶裝水

phrases.en: What time do we need to check out, and can we get a late check-out?
phrases.zh: 我們要幾點退房？可以晚點退房嗎？
phrases.tip: late check-out = 延遲退房

phrases.en: The room next door is really noisy. Could you help?
phrases.zh: 隔壁房間很吵，可以幫忙處理一下嗎？
phrases.tip: noisy = 吵；也可說 loud

phrases.en: Could someone come and clean the room while we're out?
phrases.zh: 我們外出時可以請人來打掃房間嗎？
phrases.tip: housekeeping = 房務清潔

dialogue.title: 打電話到櫃檯反映問題

lines.en: Front desk, good evening. How may I help you?
lines.zh: 櫃檯您好，晚安，有什麼可以為您服務的嗎？

lines.en: Hi, this is room 812. The air conditioning isn't cooling at all.
lines.zh: 你好，這裡是 812 房，冷氣完全不冷。

lines.en: I'm so sorry about that. I'll send a technician right away.
lines.zh: 非常抱歉，我馬上派技術人員過去。

lines.en: Thank you. Also, there's no hot water in the shower.
lines.zh: 謝謝。另外，浴室也沒有熱水。

lines.en: I'll have him check that too. Is there anything else you need?
lines.zh: 我會請他一併檢查。還有其他需要嗎？

lines.en: Yes, could we get two extra towels and one more pillow?
lines.zh: 有的，可以再給我們兩條毛巾和一顆枕頭嗎？

lines.en: Certainly. And what's your room number again?
lines.zh: 當然可以。再請問一次您的房號？

lines.en: Room 812. Oh, and could we add an extra bed for our son?
lines.zh: 812 房。對了，可以幫我兒子加一張床嗎？

lines.en: Of course. The extra bed is free of charge for children.
lines.zh: 沒問題，兒童加床是免費的。

lines.en: Great. One last thing—a wake-up call at six thirty tomorrow, please.
lines.zh: 太好了。最後一件事，明天早上六點半麻煩幫我們叫醒。

lines.en: Noted—6:30 a.m. Everything will be taken care of shortly.
lines.zh: 記下了，早上六點半。所有事情很快都會處理好。

lines.en: Thank you so much for your help.
lines.zh: 真的很謝謝你的幫忙。

title: 大眾運輸
desc: 買票、地鐵公車、轉乘、班次

phrases.en: Two tickets to Central Station, please.
phrases.zh: 兩張到中央車站的票，謝謝。
phrases.tip: 把 Central Station 換成你的目的地

phrases.en: How much is a one-way ticket to the airport?
phrases.zh: 到機場的單程票多少錢？
phrases.tip: one-way 單程／round-trip 來回

phrases.en: Is there a day pass for the whole family?
phrases.zh: 有全家可以用的一日票嗎？
phrases.tip: day pass 一日票／group ticket 團體票

phrases.en: Where can I buy tickets—at the machine or the counter?
phrases.zh: 我要在哪裡買票？售票機還是櫃檯？
phrases.tip: ticket machine 售票機

phrases.en: Does this train go to the Old Town?
phrases.zh: 這班車有到舊城區嗎？
phrases.tip: 換 this bus 這班公車

phrases.en: Which platform does the train to the airport leave from?
phrases.zh: 往機場的車是從哪個月台出發？
phrases.tip: platform 月台

phrases.en: Do I need to change trains, or is it a direct line?
phrases.zh: 我需要轉車嗎，還是這條線直達？
phrases.tip: change trains 轉車／direct 直達

phrases.en: Where do I transfer to the blue line?
phrases.zh: 我要在哪裡轉搭藍線？
phrases.tip: transfer = 轉乘／換線

phrases.en: Excuse me, which stop should I get off at for the museum?
phrases.zh: 不好意思，要去博物館我該在哪一站下車？
phrases.tip: get off 下車／stop 站

phrases.en: How many stops is it to the harbor?
phrases.zh: 到港口還有幾站？
phrases.tip: stops = 站數

phrases.en: How often do the buses come?
phrases.zh: 公車多久來一班？
phrases.tip: How often = 多久一班

phrases.en: What time is the last train tonight?
phrases.zh: 今晚的末班車是幾點？
phrases.tip: last train 末班車／first train 首班車

phrases.en: Does this card work on both the metro and the buses?
phrases.zh: 這張卡地鐵和公車都能用嗎？
phrases.tip: 類似悠遊卡的交通卡

phrases.en: Could you tell me when we reach my stop?
phrases.zh: 到我那一站時可以跟我說一聲嗎？
phrases.tip: 請司機或乘客提醒你下車

lines.en: Hi, we'd like to go to the Old Town. Two adults and two kids.
lines.zh: 你好，我們想去舊城區，兩個大人、兩個小孩。

lines.en: Sure. Are you planning to travel around all day?
lines.zh: 好的，你們打算一整天都在市區移動嗎？

lines.en: Yes, we'll be sightseeing the whole day. Is there a day pass?
lines.zh: 對，我們一整天都會觀光。有一日票嗎？

lines.en: There is. A family day pass covers all metro and bus lines.
lines.zh: 有的，家庭一日票地鐵和公車路線都可以搭。

lines.en: Great, we'll take one. Does the metro go directly to the Old Town?
lines.zh: 太好了，我們買一張。地鐵有直達舊城區嗎？

lines.en: Almost. Take the red line, then transfer to the blue line at City Hall.
lines.zh: 差不多，搭紅線，然後在市政廳站轉搭藍線。

lines.en: Which platform is the red line?
lines.zh: 紅線在哪個月台？

lines.en: Platform 2, just down the stairs on your right.
lines.zh: 第二月台，下樓梯右手邊就是。

lines.en: And how many stops until we transfer?
lines.zh: 到轉車那站還有幾站？

lines.en: Four stops to City Hall, then two more on the blue line.
lines.zh: 到市政廳四站，再搭藍線兩站。

lines.en: Perfect. One more thing—what time is the last train back?
lines.zh: 太好了。還有一件事，回程的末班車是幾點？

lines.en: Around midnight. Enjoy your day in the Old Town!
lines.zh: 大約午夜。祝你們在舊城區玩得愉快！
